summary.solar_generation_rule: generation_i(t) = solar_kwh_per_m2(t) * pv_area_m2 * pv_generation_scale; pv_area_m2 is fixed to 1.0 and pv_generation_scale is fixed to 5.0 for every building.
summary.storage_rule: storage_i(t) is capped at battery_capacity_kwh; battery_capacity_kwh is fixed to 5.0 for every building.
